series_metadata.series_description: Printed or recorded copies of public speeches given by the Chairman of the PUCO.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value. State Archives will review for possible transfer. Destroy if no historical interest to State Archives. ; Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value. State Archives will review for possible transfer. Destroy if no historical interest to State Archives., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Wastepaper
